stepSection.heading: Find Your Dream Home in 4 Easy Steps
stepSection.subtitle: Our streamlined process makes buying or renting property simple, transparent, and stress-free.
stepSection.joinText: Join thousands of satisfied customers who found their perfect home

1.title: Browse Properties
1.desc: Explore our curated collection of properties with advanced filters and virtual tours.

2.title: Schedule Viewing
2.desc: Book in-person or virtual viewings at your convenience with our smart scheduling system.

3.title: Make an Offer
3.desc: Submit your offer digitally with guided assistance and transparent documentation.

4.title: Close & Move In
4.desc: Complete the transaction smoothly and get ready to move into your new home.

cards.title: The Vision for Africa
cards.text: At Horo House, we are redefining property discovery across the continent. Born from a vision to simplify real estate access, our platform integrates deep local market understanding with world-class technology.

cards.title: Technology at Scale
cards.text: We leverage cutting-edge AI to ensure transparency and security. Our blockchain-ready infrastructure provides an unparalleled user experience in emerging African markets.

cards.title: Direct Connections
cards.text: Our platform removes the friction from real estate transactions, connecting buyers and sellers directly to foster community trust and local economic development.

cards.title: Global Standards
cards.text: With dedicated teams on the ground in multiple countries, we provide localized expertise backed by international standards of service and ethics.

aboutUs.description: We aren't just a platform; we are a movement toward transparency and digital sovereignty in African Real Estate.

ourPartners.title: Our Partners
ourPartners.description: We're proud to work with world-class companies who trust our platform

0.text: As an agent, I love the visibility and leads I get from HoroHouse. It's easy to use, and the support team is always available.

1.text: I finally found a platform that understands the African market. HoroHouse helped me find a home in Yaoundé in just 3 days.

2.text: Clean interface, verified listings, and great customer service. Just waiting for the mobile app to drop!

3.text: Fantastic platform! Helped me find an apartment quickly and easily. The virtual tours feature is amazing!

4.text: User-friendly and reliable service. The blockchain verification gives me peace of mind. Highly recommended!

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest property listings and exclusive deals.

logo.description: Your trusted partner for premium real estate across Africa. Building dreams, one property at a time.

hero.subtitle: Whether you're looking for a luxury villa or a strategic land investment, our team is here to guide you home.

success.title: Thank You.
success.subtitle: Your vision has been sent to our desk.

hero.description: We are building Africa’s most trusted digital real estate platform.

about.description1: HoroHouse is a proptech startup focused on transforming how people buy, sell, and rent property in Africa.
about.description2: Starting in Cameroon, we combine technology, data, and local expertise to eliminate fraud, simplify transactions, and restore trust in real estate. We serve everyone from first-time homebuyers to large-scale investors.

challenge.title: Why Real Estate Needed a Change
challenge.subtitle: The traditional market is plagued by inefficiencies that hurt buyers, sellers, and the economy.

fraud.title: Land Title Fraud
fraud.desc: Document falsification and multiple sales of the same property.

unverified.title: Unverified Listings
unverified.desc: Misleading information and fake property posts.

data.title: Lack of Data
data.desc: No data-driven pricing, leading to speculation.

access.title: Limited Access
access.desc: Difficulties for diaspora and international investors.

solution.title: The All-In-One Ecosystem
solution.description: HoroHouse is an all-in-one digital real estate platform that uses technology and artificial intelligence to verify properties, secure documents, and connect buyers, sellers, agents, and investors in one trusted ecosystem.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: From discovery to ownership, we’ve engineered a simple, transparent journey.

step1.title: Search & Verify
step1.desc: Explore verified properties across Cameroon and Africa. Our AI and local partners ensure every listing is authentic, with validated ownership and documents.

step2.title: Connect & Visit
step2.desc: Connect with trusted agents, schedule visits, or explore properties through virtual tours—perfect for local and diaspora users.

step3.title: Secure & Own
step3.desc: Finalize your transaction securely with digital contracts, verified land titles, and guided support until full ownership.

offer.title: What We Offer
offer.description: Key features that make HoroHouse the platform of choice.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make real estate transactions in Africa safe, transparent, and accessible through smart technology.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become Africa’s leading intelligent and secure real estate platform, redefining trust in property ownership.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: The core principles that guide every decision we make and every product we build.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: No hidden fees, no ambiguous processes. We believe in complete openness in every transaction.

security.title: Security
security.desc: We employ banking-grade security protocols to protect your assets, data, and future.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We are constantly pushing boundaries to solve old problems with specific, new technology.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: We do the right thing, even when no one is watching. Trust is our currency.

inclusion.title: Inclusion
inclusion.desc: Democratizing access to real estate wealth for everyone, regardless of location.

impact.title: Impact
impact.desc: We measure success not just by profit, but by the positive change we bring to African cities.

builtForAfrica.title: Built for Africa
builtForAfrica.desc: Solutions tailored to local realities, not copy-pasted from elsewhere.

verificationFirst.title: Verification First
verificationFirst.desc: We prioritize safety above all else. No transaction happens without checks.

techLocal.title: Tech + Local
techLocal.desc: Combining advanced AI with on-ground experts.

meetTheTeam.title: Meet The Team
meetTheTeam.desc: Our team is made up of passionate technologists, real estate professionals, and innovators committed to building a safer property ecosystem in Africa.

sarah.name: Sarah Mba
sarah.bio: Former Real Estate Investment Banker with a vision to digitize African property.

david.name: David Kamsi
david.bio: Tech veteran specializing in Blockchain and AI for secure transactions.

amara.name: Amara Ndi
amara.bio: Expert in Cameroonian land law and operational strategy.

jeanPaul.name: Jean-Paul Teno
jeanPaul.bio: Connecting buyers with verified properties for over 10 years.

inception.title: The Inception
inception.desc: Identifying the gap in the market. Conceptualizing a verified property ecosystem for Africa.

platformDev.title: Platform Development
platformDev.desc: Building the core infrastructure. Integrating AI valuation and secure document verification.

pilotLaunch.title: Pilot Launch
pilotLaunch.desc: Beta testing in Cameroon with select partners. Refining user experience based on real feedback.

panAfrican.title: Pan-African Expansion
panAfrican.desc: Scaling to Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya. Becoming the standard for trusted real estate in Africa.

trustCompliance.title: Trust & Compliance
trustCompliance.desc: We adhere to the highest standards of data protection and comply with all local real estate laws to ensure your peace of mind.

tips: Take photos in good natural lighting
Include exterior, living room, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms
Show unique features and recent renovations

media.youtubeHint: Paste only the video ID from the YouTube URL. e.g. from youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ use dQw4w9WgXcQ

whyMediaMattersTips: • Properties with 5+ photos get 3x more views

• Floor plans help buyers understand the layout faster
